context: Tests whether swiftui-webkit corrects current WebPage navigation observation and callJavaScript usage without inventing unsupported event cases or unsafe JavaScript interpolation.

checklist.name: Throwing navigation sequence
checklist.description: Requires `page.navigations` to be iterated with `for try await` and an error-handling path such as `do`/`catch`.

checklist.name: Documented event model
checklist.description: Does not use `.failed` or `.failedProvisionalNavigation` as `WebPage.NavigationEvent` cases, and instead handles navigation failure through the thrown error or `WebPage.NavigationError` path.

checklist.name: JavaScript function body
checklist.description: Explains that `callJavaScript` expects a JavaScript function body rather than a function declaration followed by a separate call expression.

checklist.name: Argument passing
checklist.description: Recommends passing `sectionID` through the `arguments` dictionary instead of interpolating it into the JavaScript source.

checklist.name: Result handling
checklist.description: Mentions defensive result casting and explicitly accounts for absent or JavaScript null results such as `nil` or `NSNull`.
